output.code:
# find the three quotes
s.find('إِنَّ عِبَادِي'), s.find('إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ'), s.find('إن الشيطان')

start3 = s.find('إن الشيطان')
# find the next quote character " after start3
idx_quote = s.find('"', start3-5) # there is opening " before?
start3, idx_quote, s[start3-5:start3+5]

open_quote = s.rfind('"',0,start3)
close_quote = s.find('"', start3)
open_quote, close_quote, s[open_quote:close_quote+1][:200]

spans=[]
# first
t1='إِنَّ عِبَادِي لَيْسَ لَكَ عَلَيْهِمْ سُلْطَانٌ إِلَّا مَنِ اتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ الْغَاوِينَ'
i1 = s.find(t1)
i1, i1+len(t1), s[i1:i1+len(t1)]==t1

t2='إِنَّهُ لَيْسَ لَهُ سُلْطَانٌ عَلَى الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَعَلَى رَبِّهِمْ يَتَوَكَّلُونَ'
i2 = s.find(t2)
i2, i2+len(t2), s[i2:i2+len(t2)]==t2

# hadith content from after opening quote at 398+? find the quote char before 'إن الشيطان'
open_q = s.rfind('"',0, start3)
open_q, start3
hadith = s[open_q+1:].strip()
len(hadith), hadith[:200]
